channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: D4vd Arrested for Alleged Murder of Celeste Rivas, Months After Body Found in Singer’s Car
item.description:
[Eerie music fades out, and the host's voice takes over]
Host: Welcome back to our show. We have some shocking news in the music world. Singer D4vd, known for his hit single "Romantic Homicide", has been arrested on suspicion of murdering 13-year-old Celeste Rivas. The investigation began when Rivas' dismembered body was found in a Tesla registered to D4vd last fall.
[Short music transition]
Host: According to the Los Angeles Police Department, D4vd is being held without bail, and his case will be presented to the District Attorney's office on Monday. The singer's attorneys have released a statement saying they will "vigorously defend" his innocence, claiming that the actual evidence will show D4vd did not commit the crime.
[Short music transition]
Host: The investigation has been ongoing since September, when police discovered Rivas' remains in the front trunk of the impounded Tesla. D4vd's name has been connected to the case since then, and he was officially confirmed as a suspect in February. The singer's career has been on hold since the discovery, with his tour and album releases being canceled or shelved.
[Short music transition]
Host: D4vd's attorneys claim that there has been no indictment or criminal complaint filed, and that he is only being detained under suspicion. We will continue to follow this story and provide updates as more information becomes available. That's all for now. Thank you for tuning in.
[Music fades out]
